&amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Create user from Excel &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/user.feature:3&amp#27;[39m 10:29:30.466 [main] INFO stepdefinitions.LoggingHooks - === Starting scenario: Create user from Excel === 2026-04-01T04:59:30.663948700Z main ERROR Log4j API could not find a logging provider. &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mI have user payload from Excel &amp#27;[1m"TC01"&amp#27;[22m in sheet &amp#27;[1m"Sheet1"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.UserSteps.createUserPayloadFromExcel(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m 10:29:32.214 [main] INFO utils.Slf4jRestAssuredFilter - REST REQUEST: POST https://petstore.swagger.io/v2/user 10:29:38.190 [main] INFO utils.Slf4jRestAssuredFilter - REST RESPONSE: HTTP/1.1 200 OK | code=200 | contentType=application/json 10:29:38.226 [main] INFO stepdefinitions.UserSteps - Status code: 200 &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mresponse status should be 200&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.UserSteps.validateStatusCode()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mresponse content type should be JSON&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.UserSteps.validateContentType()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mresponse should contain success message&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.UserSteps.validateResponseBody()&amp#27;[39m 10:29:38.679 [main] INFO stepdefinitions.LoggingHooks -
